title: The War Spreads from the Live Floor to the Roof
description: On pages 13–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Oden, Unknown person #14, Momonosuke, Luffy, Unknown person #15 as The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
scene: The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who did you call a foolish Lord!? Say it again if you dare!!! I

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was moved to tears when I heard those words...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I was moved to tears by how...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I could only watch on, as Kaido...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: threatened to drop you from the roof- top!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A short while ago I introduced myself as open...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: And I'm prepared to die for you!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - The War Spreads Across Onigashima storyline with 21 dialogue beats. The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
